ticket: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. My invoice shows two payments of $99 on the same date. Please refund one of them immediately.
resolution: Apologised for the duplicate charge, confirmed a refund was processed within 3–5 business days, and asked the customer to share the invoice number for faster processing.

ticket: The dashboard is completely broken since this morning. None of our reports load — they just spin forever. This is blocking our entire team from doing their work.
resolution: Escalated to the engineering team, provided the customer with a ticket reference, and gave an ETA of 2 hours for a status update.

ticket: It would be great if we could export our data as a CSV directly from the analytics page instead of having to use the API every time.
resolution: Thanked the customer for the suggestion, confirmed it was logged in the product roadmap, and shared the current workaround via the API.

ticket: I can't log in to my account. I reset my password three times and still get an 'Invalid credentials' error. I urgently need access.
resolution: Verified the account, manually triggered a password reset from the admin panel, and asked the customer to try again and report back.

ticket: We're about to go live with a major product launch using your API and it just stopped responding. We're losing thousands of dollars every minute. Fix this NOW or we're cancelling our enterprise contract.
resolution: Immediately escalated to the CTO and on-call engineering team. Sent the customer a direct line to the incident response manager and provided a live status page link.

ticket: Can you tell me how to add a new team member to our workspace? I'm the account admin but I can't find the invite option.
resolution: Provided step-by-step instructions to navigate to Settings > Team > Invite Members and included a help-centre link.

ticket: We've noticed some strange activity on our account — logins from IPs we don't recognise. We're worried our data might be compromised.
resolution: Treated as a potential security incident, escalated to the security team, locked the account temporarily, and asked the customer to verify their identity via a secure channel.

ticket: I would love to see dark mode added to the app. Any plans for that?
resolution: Thanked the customer, confirmed dark mode is on the roadmap for Q3, and invited them to upvote it in the community forum.

ticket: Our annual invoice renewal is coming up and we'd like to discuss upgrading to the enterprise plan. Who should we talk to?
resolution: Introduced the customer to their dedicated account manager, provided contact details, and shared the enterprise plan comparison page.
Replied politely asking the customer to describe their issue in more detail so the team could assist them effectively.
